title: Online Sessions
tagline: The same depth of presence — delivered from wherever you are.
description1: While I deeply value in-person connection, I also recognize that life’s circumstances don’t always allow for it. Whether you’re navigating a move, living in a remote area, or simply prefer the convenience of connecting from your own space, online sessions offer a powerful way to engage in this work without geographical limitations. Through video calls, we can create a shared container that fosters presence, connection, and transformation — even across the screen.
description2: Address any common concerns — does the depth of somatic or mentorship work translate online? What do you do to create safety and presence across a screen?
whoIsThisFor: A quiet, private space. A good internet connection. A device with a camera and microphone. And an open, curious mind — everything else, we create together.
